name: XQ2 Air Filter Cartridge with Filter
summary: XQ2 Air Filter Cartridge with Filter — a 510 cartridge battery for patients using 510 cartridges.
description: Keep your XQ2 protected from airborne particles, dust, and debris with this complete set which includes 1 filter cartridge and 1 triple layered filter. By replacing the cartridge with the included filter, you can save time during the process. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
